attacking_style: Insufficient data to establish clear attacking patterns. Single observation shows poor climbing form rather than offensive action.
team_tactics: Willingness to sacrifice personal GC ambitions to work as domestique when form deteriorates. Team quickly pivots to single leader strategy when secondary options falter.
terrain_preference: Classified as strong climber but UAE Tour showed vulnerability on key summit finishes. Insufficient data to confirm actual terrain strengths.
vulnerability: Fragile form - can be dropped early on decisive climbs and lose significant GC time. When struggling, loses top-10 contention rapidly (8+ minutes).
key_patterns: Single race observation insufficient to establish repeating patterns with confidence.
form_trajectory: negative: dropped early on key climb, suffered 8:27 time loss, demoted to support role mid-race
